final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, consumer electronics, and lifestyle products — suitable for both Chinese and international platforms.

Style/medium: flat illustration avatar, clean icon-style design
Composition: centered, square-crop-safe, single focal element with balanced negative space
Subject: a stylized abstract emblem combining a lightning bolt (energy / EV), a circuit or chip motif (tech / digital), and a small leaf or spark accent (lifestyle / eco); no human face or figure
Scene/backdrop: solid or minimal gradient background, platform-neutral
Lighting/mood: friendly, modern, approachable
Color palette: electric blue and white as primary, with a small accent of green or soft orange — universally positive, avoids culturally sensitive color combinations
Materials/textures: smooth flat vector shapes, subtle gloss or outline detail
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must read clearly at 100×100 px thumbnail size; no human likeness, no religious symbols, no flags, no hand gestures, no animals that carry cultural taboos; design must be culturally neutral and inoffensive across CN / US / EU / Middle East / SEA audiences
Avoid: realistic photography style, overly complex detail that collapses at small size, red-and-green combination (color-blind conflict), white-on-white, black as dominant background color, any symbol that could be read as political or religious
